lint.command: bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh && bash scripts/guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh

blockingIssues.description: Invoice Lifecycle States table in docs/modules/invoice.md lists fictitious statuses (SETTLED, CLOSED) and omits real statuses (PARTIAL, VOID, REVERSED). The actual InvoiceSettlementPolicy.InvoiceStatus enum contains: DRAFT, ISSUED, PARTIAL, PAID, VOID, REVERSED. Per CONVENTIONS.md §1.2: 'Do not invent behavior.'

Settlement Behavior section references non-existent InvoiceService.settleInvoice() method. Actual settlement flow uses InvoiceSettlementPolicy.applyPayment() and InvoiceSettlementPolicy.applySettlement().

Settlement Behavior section references non-existent AccountingFacade.postPaymentJournal() method. No such method exists anywhere in the codebase. InvoiceService does not import AccountingFacade at all.
Key Services table lists SettlementApprovalDecision and SettlementApprovalReasonCode as independent services. These are records/enums within InvoiceSettlementPolicy, not standalone services.

Cross-Module Seams table attributes AccountingFacade.postSalesJournal() to InvoiceService, but it is actually called by SalesFulfillmentService (which explicitly disables it when issueInvoice=true). InvoiceService does not call AccountingFacade.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: docs-worker must read the full service class (not just policy/helper classes) before documenting lifecycle methods and cross-module seams. The invoice.md packet's inaccuracies stem from reading InvoiceSettlementPolicy but not InvoiceService in full.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature docs-commercial-invoice-lifecycle-finance-hosts fabricated InvoiceService.settleInvoice() and AccountingFacade.postPaymentJournal() because InvoiceService.java was not read in full during the documentation session.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add invoice-specific enum values to .factory/library/ to help workers avoid confusing sales vs invoice statuses
rejectedObservations.reason: This would create a maintenance burden — the canonical packet (docs/modules/invoice.md) should itself be the truth source once fixed. Adding library entries for every enum is not scalable.
